question: Write code to create a database schema for an online bicycle shop that sells bicycles as well as their spare parts and accessories. Use SQAlchemy library to communicate with the database. from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, ForeignKey, Float
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship, declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'
    
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    type = Column(String, nullable=False)  # e.g., mountain, road, hybrid
    parts = relationship('Part', back_populates='bicycle')

class Part(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'parts'
    
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'))
    bicycle = relationship('Bicycle', back_populates='parts')

class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'
    
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)

DATABASE_URL = 'sqlite:///bicycle_shop.db'
engine = create_engine(DATABASE_URL)
Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)

def create_tables():
    Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

def add_bicycle(name, price, type):
    session = Session()
    new_bicycle = Bicycle(name=name, price=price, type=type)
    session.add(new_bicycle)
    session.commit()
    session.close()

def add_part(name, price, bicycle_id):
    session = Session()
    new_part = Part(name=name, price=price, bicycle_id=bicycle_id)
    session.add(new_part)
    session.commit()
    session.close()

def add_accessory(name, price):
    session = Session()
    new_accessory = Accessory(name=name, price=price)
    session.add(new_accessory)
    session.commit()
    session.close()

def delete_bicycle(bicycle_id):
    session = Session()
    bicycle = session.query(Bicycle).filter(Bicycle.id == bicycle_id).first()
    if bicycle:
        session.delete(bicycle)
        session.commit()
    session.close()

def update_bicycle(bicycle_id, name=None, price=None, type=None):
    session = Session()
    bicycle = session.query(Bicycle).filter(Bicycle.id == bicycle_id).first()
    if bicycle:
        if name:
            bicycle.name = name
        if price:
            bicycle.price = price
        if type:
            bicycle.type = type
        session.commit()
    session.close()

def get_bicycles():
    session = Session()
    bicycles = session.query(Bicycle).all()
    session.close()
    return bicycles

def search_bicycle_by_name(name):
    session = Session()
    bicycles = session.query(Bicycle).filter(Bicycle.name.ilike(f'%{name}%')).all()
    session.close()
    return bicycles

def close_connection():
    engine.dispose()

from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship

Base = declarative_base()

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'
    
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    category = Column(String, nullable=False)  # e.g., 'bicycle', 'spare_part', 'accessory'
    
class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'
    
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_name = Column(String, nullable=False)
    total_amount = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    
class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'
    
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'), nullable=False)
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('products.id'), nullable=False)
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    
    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="items")
    product = relationship("Product")

Order.items = relationship("OrderItem", order_by=OrderItem.id, back_populates="order")

# Database connection
engine = create_engine('sqlite:///bicycle_store.db')
Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
session = Session()

# Example operations
def add_product(name, price, category):
    new_product = Product(name=name, price=price, category=category)
    session.add(new_product)
    session.commit()

def create_order(customer_name, items):
    total_amount = sum(item['price'] * item['quantity'] for item in items)
    new_order = Order(customer_name=customer_name, total_amount=total_amount)
    session.add(new_order)
    session.commit()
    
    for item in items:
        order_item = OrderItem(order_id=new_order.id, product_id=item['product_id'], quantity=item['quantity'])
        session.add(order_item)
    
    session.commit()

def delete_product(product_id):
    product = session.query(Product).filter(Product.id == product_id).first()
    if product:
        session.delete(product)
        session.commit()

def update_product(product_id, name=None, price=None):
    product = session.query(Product).filter(Product.id == product_id).first()
    if product:
        if name:
            product.name = name
        if price is not None:
            product.price = price
        session.commit()

def search_products(keyword):
    return session.query(Product).filter(Product.name.ilike(f'%{keyword}%')).all()
